title: pinus montana subsp. mughus
intro: Pinus montana subsp. mughus, also known as the stone pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree in the pine family, native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Pinus montana subsp. mughus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pinus montana subsp. mughus include pine nuts, which can be consumed as a snack, and pine resin, which can be used to create medicinal oils and salves.
